description: CompositionGreen sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has a round ribbed neckline, sleeves with ribbed cuffs, and print on the chest with felt detailingFittingSlimWash careMachine wash inside out at 40 degrees with like coloursDo not bleachDry in shadeDo not iron on printIt's winter vacation time; a time to slip into layers of blankets and get cosy with a cup of hot tea and dreams! Slip into this Sleep Therapy cotton T-shirt from mr. men and warn the people around you to keep away, while you enjoy your beauty nap in much comfort. pair it with track pants when at home, and with jeans, a jacket and canvas shoes when enjoying that hot street food in the mist!Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.1', Shoulders- "
